title: Senior Frontend Developer at Indifi Technologies Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Indifi Technologies Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Indifi Technologies Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Indifi Technologies Holdings Services:
Indifi Technologies Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indifi Technologies Holdings Services!
